relocation.package_summary: LangChain is primarily remote-first with limited formal relocation data available for this role; most positions do not require relocation. Typical packages at similar early-stage AI startups are lump-sum based rather than full broker-managed.
relocation.policy_notes: No public LangChain relocation policy found on careers/job-board materials; verify with recruiter whether remote roles receive any relo, sign-on, lease-break, or tax gross-up. Sources checked: LangChain careers/job board and company profile.
